Let's celebrate the occasion called Life.

Our Story

Kota's
Own Bakery

Gossip started with a simple belief — that every day deserves something sweet. From a single outlet to a beloved Kota institution, we've been crafting memories one cake at a time. Every product is 100% vegetarian, made fresh daily, from the finest ingredients.

We don't just bake — we listen to your story and bake it into something you'll never forget.

2
Outlets across Kota
100%
Pure vegetarian
∞
Flavour combinations
365
Days of fresh bakes
